title: Mission Proposal & Approval
description: The agent proposes a mission to the Person Server: a Markdown description of what it intends to accomplish, plus a list of tools it will use. Because the PS acts on behalf of a human, approval requires user interaction — the PS returns 202 with an interaction URL so the user can review and approve the mission. Once approved, the PS returns the mission blob (with approver, agent, approved_at, description, approved_tools, and capabilities) and an AAuth-Mission header containing the approver URL and s256 (SHA-256 fingerprint of the blob bytes).

mission_blob.title: Approved Mission Blob
mission_blob.description: Mission proposal approved by the Person Server.
mission_blob.markdown:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

approved_tools.name: ReportWriter
approved_tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

steps.label: Discover PS metadata
annotations: Agent fetches PS well-known metadata to discover the mission_endpoint.
mission_endpoint is where the agent POSTs mission proposals for approval.

steps.label: POST /mission (sig=jwt) → 202 + interaction URL

request_body.description:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

tools.name: ReportWriter
tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

annotations: Agent POSTs the mission proposal signed with its agent token (sig=jwt).
Proposal body contains description (Markdown) + proposed tools list (§1197).
PS cannot approve without the user — it returns 202 Accepted (§1224).
AAuth-Requirement carries the interaction URL + one-time code for user review.
AAuth-Capabilities is NOT sent on PS endpoints per §1731 — the PS learns capabilities from the mission approval flow.

steps.label: Poll /pending/m3f7a1b2 → 202 (user hasn't approved yet)
annotations: Agent polls the pending URL from the Location header.
PS returns 202 — the user has not yet reviewed or approved the mission.
Agent waits Retry-After seconds before polling again.

steps.label: User reviews mission → approves
steps.response_body:
Review Agent Mission

Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

The agent aauth:local@agent.example is requesting approval for the following mission:

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

Tools the agent will use:

  • FeedbackReader — Read customer feedback records
  • ReportWriter — Write the summary report to the shared drive
annotations: User opens the interaction URL (from PS notification, email, or app).
PS displays the mission description and full tool list for review.
User reads what the agent intends to do and which tools it will use.
User clicks Approve — PS marks the mission as approved.
Per §1224 the PS or user MAY refine the description/tools here before approval — the approved blob can differ from the proposal.

steps.label: Poll /pending/m3f7a1b2 → 200 + AAuth-Mission

response_body.description:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

approved_tools.name: ReportWriter
approved_tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

annotations: User has approved — the next poll returns 200.
Response body is the approved mission blob with REQUIRED fields: approver, agent, approved_at, description (§1261).
approved_tools and capabilities are OPTIONAL fields (§1268).
AAuth-Mission header carries: approver URL + s256 (base64url SHA-256 of exact response body bytes).
Agent verifies: SHA-256(response_body_bytes) == s256 in AAuth-Mission header.
Agent stores the blob bytes exactly as received — no re-serialization (§1273).
Agent unions mission capabilities with its own to build AAuth-Capabilities on resource requests (§1729).

events.label: Proposal submitted
events.detail: PS queues mission for user review, returns pending URL + interaction URL

events.label: Still awaiting approval
events.detail: User has not yet opened the interaction URL

events.label: User approves
events.detail: User reviews mission description and tool list, clicks Approve

events.label: Mission approved
events.detail: PS returns mission blob (approver, agent, approved_at, description, approved_tools, capabilities) + AAuth-Mission header with s256
